description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to the develop branch, on pull requests to develop, on a weekly schedule, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build and benchmarks. The build job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest and macos-latest OS, and installs dependencies, ROOT, Geant4, and optional dependencies. The benchmarks job runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on the build job, and runs tests in a Docker container.
